articles.title: LPG shortage forces eateries in Velankanni to scale down menu
articles.description: With tourist operators offering only basic services, there has been sharp decline in the arrival of tourists at one of the most popular catholic pilgrim centres

articles.title: Thousands offer namaz on Id-ul-Fitr
Hyderabad gets static allocation in 2026-27 budget despite expanded region
articles.description: The 2026-27 budget shows minimal change in allocations after the tri-corporation area was renamed as Core Urban Region, with most GHMC figures retained, major funds going to infrastructure projects, and reduced allocations for disaster response, MMTS and heritage authority works.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Pezeshkian calls for forming ‘Islamic Assembly of the Middle East,' seeks help from neighbors
topStories.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Saturday called for the establishment of an Islamic Assembly of the Middle East, to ensure regional stability and peace. In a statement, he sought to mend ties with Arab neighbours amid the ongoing conflict

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Leo Tolstoy: ‘The two most powerful warriors are patience and...'
topStories.description: Leo Tolstoy's inspiring words serves a reminder that the two most powerful warriors are patience and time. While patience keeps us grounded in reality, time helps us in moving forward. The quote is extremely relevant in today's time, when everyone wants results instantly.

topStories.title: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility
topStories.description: No leakage of radioactive materials reported in the area in central Iran, Tehran's atomic energy organisation says.

topStories.title: PM Modi Speaks To Iran President, Stresses Need For Secure Shipping Lanes
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday conveyed Eid and Nowruz greetings to the President of Iran, Masoud Pezeshkian, expressing hope that this festive season brings peace, stability and prosperity...

topStories.title: West Asia: US, Israeli strikes target Iran's Natanz nuclear facility, IAEA says no increase in off-site radiation levels
topStories.description: The US and Israel launched an attack on Saturday (local time), targeting Iran's Natanz uranium-enrichment facility. However, no radioactive leaks occurred, Reuters reported, citing Tasnim news agency.

topStories.title: US jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase
topStories.description: Jury finds that two tweets posted in May 2022 by Musk contained false statements.

topStories.title: MAGA Fell In Love With A Blonde US Army Soldier. She Doesn't Exist
topStories.description: Accounts featuring AI-generated women posing as Trump-supporting soldiers and police officers have built huge audiences across social media platforms.

topStories.title: Iran War Overhang, US PMI, Crude Inventories, And Jobless Claims - The Week Ahead
topStories.description: The on-going Iran conflict will navigate through its fourth week and determine key market movements in the coming week.

topStories.title: PM Modi conveys Eid and Nowruz greetings to Iran President, stresses on open shipping lanes amid West Asia conflict
topStories.description: PM Modi spoke with Iranian President Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian, extending Eid and Nowruz greetings while emphasizing hope for peace and stability in West Asia. He condemned attacks on infrastructure, warning they disrupt global supply chains and stressed the need to secure shipping routes.

topStories.description: From Washington to Tehran to Tel Aviv, the fight to control the narrative seems as critical as the war itself.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 22 of US-Israel attacks?
dailyNews.description: As conflict enters week 4, here’s the latest on the US-Israel attack on Iran and across the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
dailyNews.description: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

dailyNews.title: Trump hints at ‘winding down’ Iran war as US deploys more troops to region
dailyNews.description: Trump says he is not looking for a ceasefire with Iran as mixed messages from US president come amid an escalating war.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: ‘Disrespect invites disrespect, violence incites violence...’
dailyNews.description: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: Meryl Streep once referred to Donald Trump who reportedly mocked a journalist, and urged the world to be kind. ‘When the powerful use their position to bully others, we all lose,’ she also said.

dailyNews.title: Explained: Why gold prices remain subdued despite West Asia tensions
dailyNews.description: Gold prices have unexpectedly fallen despite escalating geopolitical tensions, a departure from their safe-haven status. A strong U.S. dollar, rising Treasury yields, and profit-taking after a prior rally are suppressing bullion. While the near-term outlook is choppy, long-term prospects remain constructive due to persistent geopolitical risks and inflation concerns.

dailyNews.title: Warren warned Hegseth's tattoo made him a potential 'threat' — now she backs candidate with Nazi-linked ink
dailyNews.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren endorsed Maine Democrat Graham Platner despite his Nazi-linked tattoo after she once questioned Hegseth over his Christian tattoos.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani ignites social media outrage after photo-op at notorious NYC jail: 'F---ing ridiculous'
dailyNews.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani broke his Ramadan fast with Muslim inmates at Rikers Island, calling it one of the most meaningful evenings of his mayoral term.

dailyNews.title: BROADCAST BIAS: Media attack Cesar Chavez, but skip his big name Democrat fans
dailyNews.description: A New York Times probe into Cesar Chavez alleges sexual abuse of girls as young as 12, but networks conveniently leave out his presidential fans like Obama and Biden.

dailyNews.title: Widespread habit may raise colorectal cancer risk more than you think
dailyNews.description: Doctors warn that alcohol use can increase colorectal cancer risk, especially with long-term and frequent consumption, as cases rise among younger adults.

dailyNews.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
dailyNews.description: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Hiding the Truth About the War in Iran
dailyNews.description: Whatever short-term gain the president thinks he is getting by lying about the war in Iran is far exceeded by the cost, for him, the country and the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Recklessness Will ‘Haunt Us for a Generation’
dailyNews.description: Three Opinion writers on Iran, the SAVE Act and the president’s folly.

dailyNews.title: Iran says key nuclear site hit by strike; Trump mulls "winding down" operations
dailyNews.description: The Iran war reached the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
dailyNews.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: President Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Israeli-US strikes against Iran will 'increase significantly'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israel strikes.
